pullRequest.title: Prep for 8.0.22 release
pullRequest.body:
Fixes #1770

## Proposed Changes

  - Address index inclusion with new options `include_datastreams`, `include_kibana`, and `include_system`, in addition to the previous existing `include_hidden`, which now have different behaviors. `include_datastreams` will include indices that start with `.ds-*`. `include_kibana` will include indices that start with `.kibana*`. `include_hidden` will include indices that are exposed by `expand` `hidden`, as before, however it will not include `.kibana*` or system indices without expressly using those `include_*` flags. And lastly, `include_system` will include any other system index that does not start with `.secret*`, as those are protected and Curator will _always_ filter them away and will not work on them.
  - Add `tiered-debug` module and change debug logging accordingly
  - Add `--debug-level` flag to set the debug level from 1 to 5. Default is 1.
  - Fix ILM allow behavior for CLI Singletons. It was inverted from what it should have been.
